impact:
Not a bug — a PRIORITISATION finding that should shape which issues get worked. File/keep open until the linear gaps are closed, then re-measure.

ab_report.py's linear-removed-null floor (analyze.py linear_removed_null: the null we would get if EVERY linear EQ/phase difference were perfectly matched) is far deeper than the raw null on EVERY SINGLE CAPTURE:

  capture              raw null   linear-removed   linear headroom
  V1E D0.50 BL1.00      -11.1         -29.9            18.8 dB
  V1E D1.00 BL1.00       -4.6         -15.2            10.6
  V1E D0.60 BL1.00      -10.6         -29.4            18.8
  V1L D0.65 BL1.00       -4.8         -20.8            16.0
  V1L D0.45 BL0.65       -9.6         -20.9            11.3
  V1L D0.40 BL0.30       -1.9         -25.3            23.4
  V2  D0.90 BL1.00       -7.8         -21.6            13.8
  V2  D0.50 BL1.00      -13.2         -29.9            16.7
  V2  D0.50 BL0.90       -6.1         -26.1            20.0
  V2  D0.50 BL0.95      -11.3         -31.9            20.6

Per analyze.py's own documented interpretation: "linear_removed MUCH deeper than raw -> residual is mostly LINEAR -> a better taper / less discretization warp could deepen the real null toward it." That is the case everywhere, by 10-23 dB.

Median raw clean null is only -8.6 dB and median FR max|delta| is 14.75 dB — i.e. the plugin is broadly inaccurate right now, matching the user's ear/eyeball read ("large accuracy issues all over the place").

IMPLICATION FOR PRIORITY: the drive/clip gaps (ISS-001 gap A, ISS-002 gap B, ISS-004 gap D) are real and worth fixing, but they are NOT where the largest wins are. The nonlinear floor is not what is limiting the match — linear EQ/filter/level/taper errors are. The two confirmed linear structural bugs found this session (ISS-009 V1L C10 159Hz HP; ISS-008 V2 dry-path HF) are exactly this class, and each is worth more null depth than any clipping refinement.

Suggested sequence: close the linear structural bugs (ISS-009, ISS-008) -> re-run this table -> only then re-assess how much of the remaining residual is genuinely nonlinear and re-prioritise ISS-001/002/004 against the updated numbers.

Reproduce: python3.11 analysis/ab_report.py --os 8 (the "linear-removed floor" line under each capture's NULL).
title: STRATEGIC: the residual is dominated by LINEAR (EQ/filter) error, not clipping — 15-23 dB of null headroom is linear-fixable
